name: Mr. Dude: King of the Hill
description: The famous criminal Mister Dude found himself on the top of a mountain, where residents were waiting for him, ready to hand him over to the police. Help him avoid getting caught, defeat all enemies and conquer the mountain! Game Features: Interactive Ragdoll Characters: Your goal is to knock out, drag and throw your opponents using physics and fun ragdoll effects. The game has a huge number of different objects that you can manipulate and throw at your opponents. The variety of options and tactics ensures exciting gameplay. The game has various enemies, levels and modes.
instructions: Control computer WASD - movement Space - jump F - pick up an item G - eat food E - ledge grab Left mouse button - hit throw shot Right mouse button - aim 1 2 3 - switching items
